purpose.summary: This file defines the Database Description (DBD) for PADFLDBD, specifying its access method as GSAM/BSAM and defining the associated datasets PADFILIP and PADFILOP. It also includes copyright and licensing information.

inputs.name: PADFILIP
inputs.description: Input dataset for PADFLDBD, part of dataset group DSG001.

outputs.name: PADFILOP
outputs.description: Output dataset for PADFLDBD, part of dataset group DSG001.

open_questions.question: What is the purpose of the PADFLDBD database and how are the PADFILIP and PADFILOP datasets used within it?
open_questions.context: The DBD definition provides the dataset names but not their specific roles in the application.
open_questions.suggestion: Review application documentation or related modules that use this DBD.
